hero.title: Where the desert meets the ocean
hero.subtitle: Experience the best Quad, Buggy, and Horse riding in Agadir & Taghazout Bay.

services.title: Choose Your Experience
services.subtitle: From adrenaline-pumping dunes to peaceful sunset rides — find your perfect adventure.
services.quad_desc: Feel the adrenaline across the golden dunes.
services.buggy_desc: Conquer the rugged terrain in style.
services.horse_desc: A peaceful sunset ride along the coast.
services.camel_desc: Experience the traditional way of desert travel.

trips.title: Discover Your Next Adventure
trips.subtitle: Handpicked experiences designed to inspire. From desert dunes to ocean horizons.

stats.title: Our Impact in Numbers
stats.subtitle: Every number tells a story of adventure

timeline.title: The Road to Adventure
timeline.subtitle: Each step brings you closer to the experience of a lifetime.
timeline.step1_desc: Land in Agadir. Meet your guide and fellow adventurers. Settle into your accommodation and prepare for the journey ahead.
timeline.step2_desc: Explore the local culture. Short hikes to adjust to the terrain. Enjoy traditional Moroccan cuisine and hospitality.
timeline.step3_desc: Depart into the wilderness. Cross stunning landscapes, visit hidden oases, and experience the thrill of off-road adventure.
timeline.step4_desc: Reach the pinnacle of your journey. Celebrate with your team, share stories, and capture unforgettable memories.
timeline.step5_desc: Journey back with a heart full of experiences. A farewell dinner and the promise of returning for more adventures.

gallery.title: Our Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A visual journey through our most memorable adventures

footer.description: Best adventures in Agadir with professional guides. Quad, Buggy, Horse & Camel rides.
